strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems
Strong TDD, pairing, and CI/CD background with proven craftsmanship mindset
Recent hands-on work with AI agents and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in resume
Limited evidence of Kotlin; Java mentioned only briefly across older roles
Cloud/Kubernetes mentioned but no specific AWS/GCP/Azure depth beyond AWS CDK at Optilyz

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP infrastructure work
Missing Nest.js and limited Kotlin depth

response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned senior engineer with deep TypeScript/Node.js, React, MongoDB, and testing experience, plus current AI-agent and MCP work that aligns tightly with the role's AI requirements. Craftsmanship signals (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development) and architecture exposure are strong. Gaps are Nest.js (not mentioned) and limited modern Kotlin/Java depth, but these are learnable given the breadth shown. Clearly worth an interview to validate framework-specific depth.
